reader_profile: Head of Architecture (Assets, Data & Tooling) at S&P Global, recently joined from Thomson Reuters (Distinguished Engineer, Platform/DevEx). Focus: developer experience, platform engineering, internal developer portals, AI/data tooling, cloud infrastructure economics, DORA metrics. Currently onboarding and building a strategic view of the industry.
personal_interests: This is also a personal tech-interest feed, not only a work feed. The reader is a curious technologist who enjoys indie/hacker culture, programming languages and language design, retro and low-level computing, self-hosting and open source, and follows pro cycling closely. Surface things that are genuinely interesting to that person even when they have no bearing on the job.
